reference.title: Analytics Glossary
reference.shortdesc: The fields listed below are available in the CDE One and CDE Triage reports for custom reporting. Please note that this list does not include the fields available in the near-real time CDS General/ CDS Productivity report.

row.entry:
Out of the total CLU suggested codes, this column displays the count of Diagnosis codes accepted by the CDS from the CDS Assistant.
These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis, Quality diagnosis codes .
Quality codes are included in this count.

Out of the total suggested codes, This column displays the count of the diagnosis codes that were accepted, i.e. added to the Working Review or the Possible Reviews section on the Reviews screen.This column displays the count will include diagnosis codes from Suggested category (including Quality codes) and Other category.

entry.p: Displays the list of diagnoses codes accepted by the CDS from CDS Assistant.

p.note: If CDS accepts multiple codes they are displayed comma separated.

row.entry:
Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Diagnosis codes accepted by the CDS from the CDS Assistant.
These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis, Quality diagnosis codes .
Quality codes are included in this field.
Multiple values are comma separated.

Out of the total suggested codes, This column displays the count of the diagnosis codes that were accepted, i.e. added to the Working Review or the Possible Reviews section on the Reviews screen.This column displays the count will include diagnosis codes from Suggested category (including Quality codes) and Other category

entry.p: Displays the list of Activity types that is performed on the encounter.
Example: Clarification creation, Post-Discharge Review etc.
Displays the list of Activity Dates when an activity was performed.
Example: 2/8/2020
Displays the numeric day of the month of the Activity Date.
Example: If Activity date is 3/21/2020, Day_of_Month is 21
Displays the month value of the Activity Date.
Example: Feb, Jul etc.
Displays the month and year value of the Activity Date.
Example: Mar 2019, Sep 2020 etc.
Displays the numeric value of the month of the Activity Date.
Example: If Activity date is 3/21/2020, Month_of_Year is 3
Displays the week range of the Activity Date.
Example: If Activity Date is 10/15/2019, Week is 10/13 - 10/19

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the week number for the Activity Date.
Example: If Activity Date is 2/1/2021, Week_Of_Year is 6
Displays the last date of the week for the Activity Date.
Example: If Activity Date is 2/16/2021, WeekEND is 2/20/2021
entry.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

entry.p: Displays the first date of the week for the Activity Date.
Example: If Activity Date is 2/16/2021, Weekstart is 2/14/2021
entry.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

entry.p: Displays the year value for the Activity Date.
Example: If Activity Date is 2/16/2021, Year is 2021
Displays the date when the patient was admitted.
Example: 9/19/2020
Displays the numeric day of the month of the Admit Date.
Example: If Admit date is 3/21/2020, Day_of_Month is 21
Displays the month value of the Admit Date.
Example: Feb, Jul etc.
Displays the month and year value of the Admit Date.
Example: Mar 2019, Sep 2020 etc.
Displays the numeric value of the month of the Admit Date.
Example: If Activity date is 8/12/2020, Month_of_Year is 8

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the week range of the Admit Date.
Example: If Admit Date is 10/15/2019, Week is 10/13 - 10/19

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the week number for the Admit Date.
Example: If Admit Date is 2/1/2021, Week_Of_Year is 6
Displays the last date of the week for the Admit Date.
Example: If Admit Date is 2/16/2021, WeekEND is 2/20/2021

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

entry.p: Displays the first date of the week for the Admit Date.
Example: If Admit Date is 2/16/2021, Weekstart is 2/14/2021

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

entry.p: Displays the year value for the Admit Date.
Example: If Activity Date is 2/16/2021, Year is 2021

row.entry: Displays the AI suggestion that was presented in CDS Assistant.

entry.p: Displays the name of the CDS along with the ID.
Example: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)

row.entry: Displays the CDS ID of the CDS.

entry.p: Displays the name of the CDS.
Example: Last Name, First Name MI

row.entry: Displays the First Name of the CDS.
Displays the Last Name of the CDS.
Displays the Middle Initial of the CDS.

entry.p: Displays the current status of the CDS user.
Example: Active, Inactive etc.
Displays out of total clarifications sent, the percentage of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration.
% Both Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration./ Total Clarifications Sent) x 100
Example: 40%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays of total clarifications sent, the % count of Financial Impact Clarifications sent.
% Financial Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Financial Impact Clarification Type / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100
Example: 45%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Do not use.
Use Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate
Do not use.
Use Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate

row.entry: % No. of times Sent Clari Agreed

entry.p: Displays out of total overall instances sent, the percentage of overall instances agreed.
Example: 81%
Displays out of total clarifications sent, the percentage of Quality Impact Clarifications sent.
% Quality Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Quality Impact Clarification Type / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100
Example: 19%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality' in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarifications with Response as Agreed.
% Sent Clarifications Agreed = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Example: 78%
Overall Clarifications Agreed:
For Final Clarification: The count of sent clarifications with Final response as Agreed.
For Not Final Clarifications: The count of sent clarifications with at least one ‘agreed’ instance.

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarifications Not Final.
% Sent Clarifications Not Final = ((Count of clarifications which do not have a Final Response/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Example: 15%

p.note: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarifications not responded
% Sent Clarifications Not Responded = ((Count of clarifications which are not responded/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Example: 28%

p.note: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total clarifications sent, the % of SEV Impact Clarifications sent.
% SEV Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with primary type at Reconciliation as SEV / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100
Example: 67%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the list of Quality Alert categories available.
Example: PSI, PDI, NQI
Displays the Average Response Turn Around Time (TAT) in days.

Avg. Response TAT (Days) = Sum of Response TAT (Days) of all the instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response/ Total count of instances Responded (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in days.
Example: 8

note.p: Clarification Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Removed and Retracted status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the Average Response Turn Around Time (TAT) in hours.

Avg. Response TAT (Hours) = Sum of Response TAT (Hours) of all the instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response/ Total count of instances Responded (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in hours.
Example: 258

note.p: Clarification Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Removed and Retracted status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total clarifications with BOTH (financial and quality) Impact Agreed, the percentage of clarifications with BOTH (financial and quality) Impact Responded.
BOTH Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((BOTH Impact Clarification Agreed/BOTH Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)
Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89% or 100%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarifications Sent, the percentage of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration responded.

Both Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration responded./ Both Impact Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89% or 100%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration agreed.
This field displays the count of sent BOTH Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: Displays the count of sent clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration, for which has FINAL response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: Displays the count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration.

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This displays the Clarification Response Turn Around Time (Hours) for all the clarifications in the encounter.
Example : 547
Displays the count of clarifications which have at least one instance response.
Example: 45
Displays the count of clarifications with a Final Response.
Example: 75
This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Agreed.
When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Agreed
This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Alternative Diagnosis
When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Alternative Diagnosis
This is a flag to identify the Clarification Created Date.
When used in reports, displays the date the clarification is created.
This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Discuss.
When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Discuss.
This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as No Response.
When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as No Response.
This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Not Agreed.
When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Not Agreed.
This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Other Explanation.
When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Other Explanation.
This is a flag to identify clarifications reponded.

p.note: When used in report, displays the total count of clarifications responded.

entry.p: This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Sent to Another Provider.
When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Sent to Another Provider.
This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Unable to Determine.
When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Unable to Determine.
Displays the name of the provider with Final response to the resolved clarification.
Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
Displays the name of the CDS who initiated the clarification.
Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Displays the date when clarification was closed.
Example: 5/25/2020
Displays the date when clarification was closed.
Example: 1/25/2021

row.entry: Clarification Closed Date and Time Display

entry.p: Displays the date and time when clarification was closed.
Example: 1/25/2020

p.note: Facility Timezone is considered.

entry.p: Displays the date when clarification was created.
Example: 5/25/2020
Displays the date when clarification was created.
Example: 1/25/2021
Displays the Follow-up date as entered by the CDS when they review and save the encounter.
Example: 1/13/1990
Displays the Impact for the Clarification type (Both standard and custom) when CDS raises the clarification.
Example: Financial Impact, Quality Impact, Both Impact

p.note: Impact is configured in Clarifications ---> Type Setup for both standard and custom clarification types.

entry.p: Displays the list of Primary Type at Reconciliation clarification types.
Example: CC, MCC, MST, Custom1, Custom2

p.note: Both standard and custom clarification types is considered.

entry.p: Displays the name of the provider to whom the clarification was sent.
Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
Displays out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of sent clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.
Clarification Rate = (Count of clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters/Count of Initial Reviews performed)*100
Example: 67%

p.note: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Displays the Clarification Response turn around time in Days.
Response TAT (Days) for a clarification = Sum of Response TAT (Days) for all the instances (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in the clarification.
Example: 400

note.p: Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.
Clarifications Response TAT is not calculation for clarifications with Removed and Retracted status.

p.note: If less than 24 hours, count as (0) days.

entry.p: Displays the Clarification Response turn around time in Hours.
Response TAT (Hours) for a clarification = Sum of Response TAT (Hours) for all the instances (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in the clarification.

note.p: Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.
Clarifications Response TAT is not calculation for clarifications with Removed and Retracted status.

row.entry: Displays the clarification source associated to the encounter.

entry.p: Displays the different statuses for a clarification.
Example: Closed, Deleted, Retracted, Sent etc
Displays the list of available 'Type at Reconciliation' clarification types.
Example: CC, MCC, CLIN VAL, Custom1, Custom2 etc

p.note: Both standard and custom clarification type is considered.

entry.p: Displays the review timing of the clarification based on the final instance.
Example: Concurrent , Retrospective.

note.p: Concurrent Clarification if instance is marked final before patient's discharge.
Retrospective Clarification if instance is marked final after patient's discharge.
Blank if clarification does not have a final instance.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the date when clarification was closed.
Example: 9/18/2020
Displays the CM/PCS for which the clarification is raised by the CDS.
Example: R52, A208, 02HA4RS etc.
Displays the CM/PCS code description for which the clarification is raised by the CDS.
Example: R52, A208, 02HA4RS etc.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Enc with No Response Impact Clarifications

entry.p: Count of encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with Final Response as No Response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Displays the flag to indicate if the clarification is deleted.
Example: True, False

p.note: True is displayed for deleted clarifications.

entry.p: Displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.
Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED./ Count of Initial Reviews performed) *100
Example: 44%

p.note: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Displays the total count of clarifications sent for encounters with Initial Review.
Example: 56
Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.
Example: 69

p.note: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.
Example: 45

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Quality Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.
Example: 34

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

row.entry:
Displays whether the overdue clarification instance is escalated.
Format: Y/N.
The count of overdue clarification instances with at least one clarification escalation checkbox selected.

Displays the name of the selected escalation checkbox.
Examples: 1st Escalation, 2nd Escalation, Liaison Escalation, CDI Manager Escalation.When multiple escalation checkboxes are selected, the values are displayed as comma-separated entries.

entry.p: Displays the flag to indicate if the clarification has a Final response
Example: True, False

p.note: True is displayed for clarifications with Final Response.

entry.p: Displays the flag for clarifications with Final Response.
Example: Y

p.note: Y is displayed for clarifications with Final Response, Blank is displayed for clarifications without Final Response.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the count of Financial Impact Clarifications.
Example: 2

p.note: Clarification with 'Primary Type' as CC, PDX, MCC, PROC, MST, HIV, POA are termed as Financial Impact Clarifications.

entry.p: Displays out of total Financial Impact Clarifications Responded, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed.
Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((Financial Impact Clarification Agreed/ Financial Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)
Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89% or 100%
Example: 89%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications.
Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications /Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) )* 100)
Example: 67%

note.p: Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations

entry.p: Displays out of total Financial Impact Clarifications Sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications Responded.
Financial Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((Financial Impact Clarification Responded/ Financial Impact Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Example: 75%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: Displays the count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.
Example : 47

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: Displays the count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.
Example: 66

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: Displays the count of Financial Impact clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters.
Example: 39

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the Follow-up date as entered by the CDS when they review and save the encounter.
Example: 1/13/1990

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the list of available Financial Impact Clarification types.
Example: CC, PDX etc.

p.note:
Clarification with 'Type at Reconciliation' as CC, PDX, MCC, PROC, MST, HIV, POA are termed as Financial Impact Clarifications.
Both standard and custom 'Type at Reconciliation' clarification types is considered.

entry.p: Displays the total count of Agreed responses for Financial Impact Clarifications sent.
Example: 15

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Instance Response Date and Time Display

entry.p: Displays the date and time when the instance is responded.

p.note: Facility Timezone is considered.

entry.p: Displays the Instance Response turn around time in Days.
Instance Response TAT (Days) = (Instance Response Date – Instance Sent Date) in days.

note.p: Instance Response TAT is not calculated for Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response.
If less than 24 hours, count as (0) days.

entry.p: Displays the Instance Response turn around time in Hours.
Instance Response TAT (Hours) = (Instance Response Date/Time – Instance Sent Date/Time) in hours.

p.note: Instance Response TAT is not calculated for Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response.

row.entry:
Identifies and exports list of clarification with Instance Sent Date/time > Discharge Date/time.
Format : Y/N
Instance Sent Date and Time Display

entry.p: Displays the date and time when the instance is sent

p.note: Facility Timezone is considered.

row.entry: This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as agreed.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Alternative Diagnosis.

entry.p: Displays the User ID of the CDS who has sent the instance.
Example: marshad
Displays the Name of the CDS who has sent the instance.
Example: Last Name, First Name (User ID)

row.entry: This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances responded.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances sent.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Discuss.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response marked as Final
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with Final response as Not Agreed.
Displays the User ID (CDS ID) of the Follow up CDS for the clarification instance.

entry.p: Displays the name and CDS ID of the Follow up CDS for the clarification instance.
Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Displays the message of the instance when provider responds to the clarification instance.

p.note: This is the text from the message field displayed in Response tab in Clarifications Screen.

row.entry: This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as No Response.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Not Agreed.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Other Explanation.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Pending.
This is a flag to identify rge provider response of the clarification instance.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances sent electronically.
This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of instances with Instance Response as Retracted.

entry.p: Count of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as No Response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Out of total financial impact clarifications sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as “No Response” .
No Response Impact Clarification Rate = (Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as No Response / Count of Financial Impact Clarifications Sent) *100. Format: 1.67%.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Non Responding Providers
Displays the count of (Sent To) providers with at least one financial impact clarification instance responded as No Responses, i.e. Provider Response Field = No Response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Not Responded Impact Clarifications
Displays the count and percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications that were not responded by the providers and with Final Response as No Response for the selected time period.
Format: Not Responded Impact Clarifications (No Response Rate). E.g. 12 (56%).
Not Responded Impact Clarifications = Count of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as “No Response” for the selected time period.
No Response Rate = Out of total Financial Impact clarifications sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as “No Response” .
No Response Rate = (Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as No Response / Count of Financial Impact Clarifications Sent) *100.

row.entry: National Provider Identifier of the provider to whom the clarification was sent.
National Provider Identifier of the provider who responded to the clarification.

entry.p: Displays the list of available 'Other Reconciliation Types' assigned to the clarification.
Example: Generic, HCC, Customclar1

p.note: Both standard and custom clarification types is considered.

entry.p: Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Displays the list of available 'Other Type' assigned to the clarification.
Example: Generic, HCC, Customclar1

p.note: Both standard and custom clarification types is considered.

entry.p: Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarifications agreed.
Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 45%

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

row.entry: Overall Agreed Rate (Agreed and Alternative Diagnosis

Overall Agreed Rate (Agreed and Alternative Diagnosis) = ( count of clarifications with Final response as Agreed or Alternative Diagnosis/ Overall Clarifications Responded with a Final response) x 100). Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status is not considered for this metric calculation. Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count. Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Overall Agreed Rate (Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses Responses)

entry.p: Out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarifications agreed with Final response as Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses.
Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed with Final response as Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

ul.li: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total clarifications, the percentage of clarification with status as Deleted.
Overall Clarifications Deleted Rate = ((Overall Clarifications with status as Deleted / Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Example: 7%

p.note: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Discuss".
Overall Clarifications Discuss Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Discuss/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 56%

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

row.entry: Overall Clarifications Agreed (Agreed and Alternative Diagnosis)

entry.p: Overall Clarifications Agreed (Agreed and Alternative Diagnosis) = The count of clarifications with Final response as Agreed or Alternative Diagnosis. E.g. 24.Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status is not considered for this metric calculation. Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "No Response".
Overall Clarifications No Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications with No Response/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Example: 10%

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

entry.p: Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Not Agreed".
Overall Clarifications Not Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Not Agreed / Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 12%

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

entry.p: Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Other Explanation".
Overall Clarifications Other Explanation Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Other Explanation/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 45%

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

entry.p: Displays out of total clarifications, the percentage of clarification with status as Retracted.
Overall Clarifications Retracted Rate = ((Overall Clarifications with status as Retracted / Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Example: 1%

p.note: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Overall Clarification Sent to another Provider Rate

entry.p: Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Sent to another Provider".

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

row.entry: Overall Clarification Unable to Determine Rate

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the percentage of Clarification Instances with Response as Agreed.
Overall Instance Agreed Rate = Instances with response as Agreed / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 20%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Alternative Diagnosis.

Overall Instance Alternative Diagnosis Rate = Instances with Response as "Alternative Diagnosis" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 44%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the percentage of Clarification Instances with Response as Discuss.
Overall Instance Discuss Rate = Instances with Response as "Discuss" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 89%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarifications Instances sent with Response other than Retracted , the % of Clarification Instances with Response as No Response.
Overall Instance No Response Rate = Instances with Response as "No Response" / The count of clarification instances sent with Response other than Retracted ) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 15%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response , the percentage of Clarification Instances with response as Not Agreed.

Overall Instance Not Agreed Rate = Instances with Response as "Not Agreed" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 23%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Other Explanation.

Overall Instances Other Explanation Rate = Instances with Response as "Other Explanation" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 41%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarification Instances sent with response other than Retracted, the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Pending
Overall Instance Pending Rate = Instances with Response as "Pending" / The count of total clarification instances sent with response other than Retracted) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 5%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarification Instances sent with response other than Retracted, the % of clarification Instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response.

Overall Instance Response Rate = (The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response /The count of sent clarification instances with Response other than Retracted.) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 100%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of total Clarification Instances sent including Retracted , the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Retracted
Overall Instance Retracted Rate = Instances with Response as "Retracted" / The count of total clarification instances sent including Retracted ) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 11%

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

entry.p: This is a column at clarification level to indicate if the clarification is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Example: Displays 1 for Financial Impact Clarifications
Displays the list of clarification sent dates for the clarifications created by CDS that are sent to physician/provider.
Displays the numeric day of the month of the Clarification Sent Date
Example: If Clarification Sent Date is 3/21/2020, Day_of_Month is 21
Displays the month value of the Clarification Sent Date.
Example: Feb, Jul etc.
Displays the month and year value of the Clarification Sent Date.
Example: Mar 2019, Sep 2020 etc.
Displays the numeric value of the month of the Clarification Sent Date.
Example: If clarification sent date is 8/12/2020, Month_of_Year is 8
Displays the week range of the clarification sent date.
Example: If Clarification Sent Date is 10/15/2019, Week is 10/13 - 10/19

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the week number for the clarification sent date.
Example: If clarification sent date is 2/1/2021, Week_Of_Year is 6
Displays the last date of the week for the clarification sent date.
Example: If clarification sent date is 2/16/2021, WeekEND is 2/20/2021

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

entry.p: Displays the first date of the week for the clarification sent date.
Example: If clarification sent date is 2/16/2021, Weekstart is 2/14/2021

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

entry.p: Displays the year value for the clarification sent date.
Example: If clarification sent date is 2/16/2021, Year is 2021

row.entry: Displays the count of clinical evidences that are attributed to a suggested/working diagnosis by a CDS.
Displays the count of clinical evidences that are removed manually.
Displays the count of clinical evidences that has no suggested diagnosis code associated with it.
Displays the count of clinical evidences that has suggested diagnosis code associated with it.There can be multiple diagnosis codes associated with a clinical evidence.
The clinical evidences that are attributed to a suggested/working diagnosis by a CDS.Multiple values are displayed comma separated.

Displays the working diagnosis code linked with the clinical evidence.The CLU suggested diagnosis codes, the quality diagnosis codes, and the diagnosis codes added in the Working Review section are displayed in the Select Diagnosis drop-down list. The removed and the other category codes are excluded from the list.
Displays the clinical evidences that are removed manually for the encounter. Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Displays the clinical evidences that has no suggested diagnosis code associated with it for the encounter.Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Displays the clinical evidences that has suggested diagnosis code associated with it.There can be multiple diagnosis codes associated with a clinical evidence and should be displayed comma separated.
Displays the clinical diagnoses that has suggested diagnosis code associated with it.

entry.p: Displays the response by the physician/provider for the clarification sent.
Example: Agreed, Retracted, Not Final.
Displays the ACTIVE ind from the actives raised by the CDS
Displays the ACTIVE for the ACTIVE ind (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the active.
Example: Financial ACTIVE, Quality ACTIVE, Both ACTIVE
Displays the status of the clarification.
Example: Retracted, Closed, Sent
Displays the status of the clarification.
Example: Retracted, Closed, Sent.
Displays the template selected by the CDS while creating a clarification from the Template drop down on the Clarification Screen.
Example: Clinical Validation Clarification Template, Proc Clarification Template

row.entry: Displays the description of the template selected by the CDS while creating a clarification on the Clarification Screen.

entry.p: Displays the 'Primary Type' of the clarification raised by the CDS.
Example: CC, CLIN VAL, Sepsis etc.

p.note: Both Standard and Custom Clarification types are considered.

entry.p: Displays Boolean value (True/False) as per the Financial Impact status selected in the Reconciliation Assessment screen.
Example: If CDS selects 'Financial Impact' in the Reconciliation Assessment DRG screen , FINANCIAL_IMPACT Column displays True.
Displays Boolean value (True/False) as per the Other Impact status selected in the Reconciliation Assessment screen.
Example: If CDS selects 'Other Impact' in the Reconciliation Assessment DRG screen , OTHER_IMPACT Column displays True.
Displays the description of the 'Primary Type' selected by the CDS.
Example: Complication/Co-morbidity, Clinical Validation, Sepsis caused due to e-coli etc.

p.note: Both Standard and Custom clarification types are considered.

entry.p: Displays out of total clarifications sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications sent.
%Financial Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Financial Impact Clarification Type / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100
Example: 56%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the current status of the diagnosis/procedure code as per the action performed by the CDS on CDS Assistant from the application.
Example: accepted, rejected, hidden etc.
Displays the ID of the current status of the diagnosis/procedure codes as per the action performed by the CDS on CDS Assistant.
Example: Displays "A" for Accepted, "R" for Rejected, "H" for Hidden etc.
Displays the current status of the diagnosis/procedure code as per the action performed by the CDS on CDS Assistant.
Example: Accepted, Rejected, Hidden etc.
Displays the final provider response on the clarification.
Example: Agreed, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Other Explanation.

p.note: In cases of multiple instances of a clarification, only the final response is displayed.

entry.p: Displays the Response Type ID for the final response on the clarification.
Example: AGREED, ALTERNATIVE
_DIAGNOSIS, OTHER_EXPLANATION

row.entry: Displays the External name as mentioned in the Organization Configuration screen.
Displays the Organization description as mentioned in the Organization Configuration screen.
Displays the URI Identifier value as mentioned in the Organization Configuration screen.

entry.p: Displays the Payer assigned to the encounter along with the Payer ID
Example: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Displays the payer category as assigned on the Payer configuration screen.

p.note: Unassigned Category is displayed if no Payer Category is selected from the drop down on the payer configuration screen.

row.entry: Displays the Payer ID as configured in the Payer configuration screen.
Displays the Payer Description as configured in the Payer configuration screen.

entry.p: Displays the Group By options from the Quality Alerts report.
Example: Encounter CDS, PSI Topic.
Displays a numeric value for the Group by option as per their position in Quality Alerts report.
Example: SORT_ORDER = 1 if PSI_Alerts_GroupBy option is Encounter CDS, SORT_ORDER = 8 if PSI_Alerts_GroupBy option is Admit Quarter etc.
Displays the Quality Alert category triggered for encounter.
Example: PSI, PDI, NQI

p.note: Blank is displayed if no Quality Alert is triggered.

entry.p: Displays the description of the Quality Alert triggered.
Example: Iatrogenic Pneumothorax, Postop Sepsis etc.

p.note: Blank is displayed if no Quality Alert is triggered.

entry.p: Displays the Quality Alert topic triggered.
Example: PSI_06 Iatrogenic Pneumothorax, PSI_13 Postop Sepsis etc
Displays the Topic ID associated with the Quality Alert topic.
Example: TOPIC_ID = 6 for 'PSI_06 Iatrogenic Pneumothorax' Topic, TOPIC_ID = 10 for 'PDI_10 Pediatric Postop Sepsis' Topic etc.
Displays the ROM Value
Example: ROM 1, ROM 2 etc
Displays the description of the ROM value.
Example : Minor (if ROM Value is 1), Moderate (if ROM Value is 2)
Displays the ROM Value
Example: 1, 2 ,3, 4
Displays the description of the SOI value.
Example : Minor (if SOI Value is 1), Moderate (if SOI Value is 2)
Displays the SOI Value
Example: SOI 1, SOI 2 etc
Displays the SOI Value
Example: 1, 2 ,3, 4
Displays the Status code as per the encounter status.
Example: D (if Encounter Status is Discharged), IP (if Encounter Status is In Progress)
Displays the encounter status.
Example: In Progress, Discharged, Review Complete etc.
Displays the type of codes suggested by the engine.
Example: CC, HAC, PROC etc.

p.note: Multiple rows will be displayed if an encounter has more than one suggestion type suggested by the engine.

entry.p: Displays the Visit Type of the encounter.
Example: Visit Type Description (Visit Type ID)
Displays the description of the Visit Type as configured in the Visit Type configuration screen.
Example: Inpatient
Displays the ID of the Visit Type as configured in the Visit Type configuration screen.
Example: I
Displays the numeric day of the month of the Discharge Date.
Example: If Discharge date is 3/21/2020, Day_of_Month is 21
Displays the date when the patient was discharged.
Example: 9/19/2020
Displays the month value of the Discharge Date.
Example: Feb, Jul etc.
Displays the month and year value of the Discharge Date.
Example: Mar 2019, Sep 2020 etc
Displays the numeric value of the month of the Discharge Date.
Example: If Discharge date is 8/12/2020, Month_of_Year is 8
Displays the week range of the Discharge Date.
Example: If Discharge Date is 10/15/2019, Week is 10/13 - 10/19

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the week number for the Discharge Date.
Example: If Discharge Date is 2/1/2021, Week_Of_Year is 6
Displays the last date of the week for the Discharge Date.
Example: If Discharge Date is 2/16/2021, WeekEND is 2/20/2021

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

entry.p: Displays the first date of the week for the Discharge Date.
Example: If Discharge Date is 2/16/2021, Weekstart is 2/14/2021

p.note: Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.

entry.p: Displays the year value for the Discharge Date.
Example: If Discharge Date is 2/16/2021, Year is 2021
Displays the count of encounters.
Example: #Encounter is 2 if there are 2 encounters with the same account number.

row.entry: Displays out of total initial reviews performed, the percentage of encounters reviewed by the CDS.

entry.p: Out of the total codes suggested presented on CDS assistant, the percentage of codes that were accepted by the CDS.
% Codes Accepted = (Total count of codes accepted by the CDS / Total count of codes suggested). This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Out of total suggestions presented on CDS Assistant, this metric displays the percentage of suggestions that were addressed by the CDS.
% Codes Addressed = (Count of suggestions addressed by the CDS / Total count of suggestions presented on CDS Assistant).
Out of the total codes suggested presented on CDS assistant, the percentage of codes that were rejected/removed by the CDS.
% Codes Removed = (Total count of codes removed by the CDS / Total count of codes suggested). This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.

row.entry: Out of the total codes suggested presented on CDS Assistant, the count of codes that were unaddressed or no action was taken by the CDS for the selected 'View By' option.

entry.p: Displays out of total discharges, the percentage of encounters reviewed.
Example: 78%

row.entry: Displays the count and percentage of encounters ranked for the selected time period.% Encounters Ranked = (Count of encounters ranked/ Total Encounters) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
% Encounters with CC to MCC Shift

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC for the selected View By option.
% Encounters with CC to MCC Shift = Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC / Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift x100.
Displays out of total discharges, the percentage of encounters that had at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant. Format: 78%.
% Encounters with Code Suggestions = (Count of encounters with at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant/Total count of discharges) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.

row.entry: % Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC for the selected View By option.

% Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC = Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC / Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift x100

row.entry:
Displays the percentage of encounters for which review was performed after discharge, meaning out of total encounters discharged, this metric displays the count of encounters with no initial review or initial review after discharge for the selected View By option.
Missed Concurrent Reviews = Discharged encounters with no initial review or initial review after discharge, that is, Initial Review Date/Time is Blank or Initial Review Date/Time > Discharge Date/Time.

Displays the count of encounters with the top rank as 1, 2, or 6 that were not reviewed by the CDS. These encounters don't have an initial review date/time and may or may not have a discharge date/time..
Missed Top Rank Reviews = Count of top-ranked encounters (Rank 1, 2, and 6) without an initial review, indicated by an empty or unspecified Initial Review Date/Time.
% of Reconciled Cases NCC After CDI

entry.p: Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC.

% of Reconciled cases NCC After CDI = (Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) *100
Rounded to 0 decimal places; Example: 55%

ul.li: Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the NCC DRGs for the encounters.
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.

row.entry: % of Reconciled Cases NCC and NULL After CDI

entry.p: Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC and NULL

% of Reconciled cases NCC After CDI = (Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) *100
Rounded to 0 decimal places; Example: 55%

ul.li: Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the NCC and NULL DRGs for the encounters.
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.

row.entry: % of reconciled cases with Both Impact

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Both Impact.

% of reconciled cases with Both Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Both Impact /The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100
Rounded to 0 decimal places
Example: 22%

row.entry: % of Reconciled Cases with CC After CDI

entry.p: Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC.

Formula: % of Reconciled cases with CC After CDI = (Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) *100

ul.li: Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the CC DRGs for the encounters.
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.

row.entry: % of reconciled cases with Financial Impact

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Financial Impact.

% of reconciled cases with Financial Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Financial Impact / The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100.
Rounded to 0 decimal places
Example: 45%

row.entry: % of Reconciled Cases with MCC After CDI

entry.p: Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as MCC.

% of Reconciled cases with MCC After CDI = (Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as MCC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) *100
Rounded to 0 decimal places; Example: 55%

ul.li: Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the MCC DRGs for the encounters.
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.

row.entry: % of reconciled cases with No Impact

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as 'No Impact'.

% of reconciled cases with No Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as 'No Impact' / The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100
Rounded to 0 decimal places
Example: 5%

row.entry: % of reconciled cases with SOI/ROM Impact

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as SOI/ROM Impact.

% of reconciled cases with SOI/ROM Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as SOI/ROM Impact / The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100
Rounded to 0 decimal places
Example: 19%

row.entry: % of reconciled cases with Unassigned Impact

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Blank Impact Type

% of reconciled cases with Unassigned Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Blank Impact Type/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100
Rounded to 0 decimal places
Example: 32%

row.entry: Out of total medical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as NCC
% of Reconciled Medical Cases NCC and NULL
Out of total medical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as NCC and NULL
% of Reconciled Medical Cases with CC
Out of total medical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as CC
% of Reconciled Medical Cases with MCC
Out of total medical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as MCC
Out of total surgical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as NCC
% of Reconciled Surgical Cases NCC and NULL
Out of total surgical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as NCC and NULL
% of Reconciled Surgical Cases with CC
Out of total surgical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as CC
% of Reconciled Surgical Cases with MCC
Out of total surgical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as MCC

Displays the count and percentage of ranked encounters reviewed for the selected time period% Ranked Initial Reviews: ({Count of ranked encounters with an initial review date/time} /Total Count of Initial Reviews) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.

Displays the percentage of the ranked encounters reviewed for the selected "View By" option, out of the total ranked encounters.% Ranked Encounters Reviewed: (Count of ranked encounters reviewed /Count of encounters ranked) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) which are Medical. % Reconciled Medical Cases = The total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact./ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places.Example: 7% Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical). Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) which are Surgical. % Reconciled Medical Cases = The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact./ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places.Example: 10%Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical).Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
Displays out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of encounters that had at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant. Format: 78%.
Displays the by cds from the % reviews raised by the CDS
Displays the by for the % Reviews cds (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the % reviews.
Example: Financial by, Quality by, Both by
Out of the total suggestions that were presented on CDS Assistant, the percentage of codes for which CDS generated a clarification.
% Suggestions Clarified = (Total count of suggestions for which CDS generated a query / Total count of suggestions presented on CDS Assistant) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.

row.entry: The count of unranked encounters reviewed with or without clarifications.% Unranked Encounters = (Count of encounters NOT ranked {Unranked Encounters}/ Total Encounters (Discharges)) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.

Displays the count and percentage of unranked encounters reviewed for the selected time period.% Unranked Initial Reviews: ({Count of unranked encounters with an initial review date/time} /Total Count of Initial Reviews) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.

Displays the percentage of the ranked encounters reviewed for the selected "View By" option, out of the total ranked encounters.% Unranked Encounters Reviewed: Unranked Encounters Reviewed / Encounters Ranked x 100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places. For example, 30%.

entry.p: Displays the admission date of the patient.
Example: 2/22/2020
Displays the admission date of the patient.
Example: 2/22/2020
Displays the admission date and time of the patient.

p.note: Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.

row.entry: Displays the Admit Service assigned to the encounter.

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_MONTH is 2020-09(Sep)
Displays the Admit Quarter as per the Admission Date .
Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_QUARTER is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Displays the Admit Week as per the Admission Date .
Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_WEEK is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Displays the year and month as per the Admission Date.
Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_YEARMONTH is 202009
Displays the admitting Diagnosis assigned to the encounter.
If the Admitting Diagnosis is blank or null or is not available, the report displays Unassigned Admitting Diagnosis for the encounter.
Example: Unassigned Admitting Diagnosis

row.entry: Displays the age of the patient during admission.

entry.p: This is field to specify the unit associated with the age value.
Example: y,m,d
Displays the total count of encounters with all statuses including Review Not Needed.

note.p: When the Discharge Date is applied, then this displays the count of discharged encounters with all statuses including Review Not Needed.
When the Admit Date is applied, then this displays the count of admitted encounters with all statuses including Review Not Needed.

Displays the total count of encounters which were assigned to a CDS but there was no initial review.
Example: 47
Avg. Ranked Review TAT (Hours)

Displays the average Ranked Review TAT in hours for the selected View By option, i,e the time it takes the CDS to complete a review for a ranked encounter, i.e. the number of hours between Review Complete Date/Time and when the Working Review was first created.
Avg. Ranked Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review TAT (Hours) of all the ranked reviewed encounters / Ranked Encounters Reviewed).

row.entry:
Displays the average Review Turnaround Time (TAT) in hours for the selected "View By" option. Review TAT represents the time taken by the CDS to complete a review for an encounter, calculated as the number of hours between the Review Complete (Date/Time) and the initial creation of the Working Review.
Avg. Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review TAT (Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed).

entry.p: Displays the average count of suggestions presented on CDS Assistant for every encounter that has an initial review date/time assigned to it.

Displays the average Unranked Review TAT in hours for the selected View By option, i,e. the time it takes the CDS to complete a review for a unranked encounter, i.e. the number of hours between Review Complete Date/Time and when the working review was first created.
Avg. Unranked Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review TAT (Hours) of all the unranked reviewed encounters / Unranked Encounters Reviewed).
Displays the provider/physician attending the patient.
Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title

Example: 15.54
Displays the blended rate as configured in the Payer configuration screen.
Example: 1500

p.note: If Blended Rate is blank/unavailable, Operating Federal Rate is used for reimbursement calculations.

entry.p: Displays the name of the CDS.
Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)

row.entry: Displays the count of assigned encounters for which a review is performed.
Displays the count of assigned encounters for which an initial review is done.
CDS WORKING REVIEW OR DISCOVERED DX

Displays the list of all CDS Working Review or Discovered DX. Multiple values are displayed comma separated. These are the diagnosis codes as suggested by the CLU engine or manually added.
Diagnosis codes suggested by the engine are displayed in blue hyperlink in the Triage Worklist
Diagnosis codes manually added are displayed in black in the Triage Worklist.
Partial codes are displayed in upper-case, and fully qualified codes are displayed in mixed-case (upper and lower).

entry.p: Displays the CDS/Coder Match Rate .
CDS/Coder Match Rate = (Count of Reconciled Encounters with Match =Y / Count of Reconciled Encounters in the selected date range) *100
Example: 45%
Out of total encounters, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications agreed with Final Response as Agreed.
Chart Impact Rate = (Count of Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed with Final response as Agreed /Total Encounters) *100
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 45%
Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed = The count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

ul.li: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: Total Encounters= The total count of encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.

ul.li: When the Discharge Date is applied, then this displays the count of discharged encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.
When the Admit Date is applied, then this displays the count of admitted encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.

row.entry: Encounters with No Response Impact Clarifications

Count of encounters with at least one clarification instance with Final Response as No Response for the selected time period.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
CMI Shift of Encounters with No Response Impact Clarifications

entry.p: Displays shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) that have at-least one impact clarifications with Final Response as 'No Response'

CMI Shift of Encounters with No Response Impact Clarifications= CALCULATE(([Overall CMI After CDI]- [Overall CMI Before CDI]), 'Encounter Details'[IS_RECONCILED]=1, 'Clarification Details'[CLAR_NORESPONSE]=1
This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Example: 4.1478
Displays the name of the CDS.
Example: Last Name, First Name

row.entry: Displays the count and percentage of codes accepted by the CDS for the selected time period.

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of suggestions that were addressed by the CDS for the selected time period.

row.entry: Displays the total count of AI suggestion codes presented on CDS Assistant for the selected View By option.

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of codes removed by the CDS for the selected time period.

row.entry: The count of AI suggestions that were unaddressed by the CDS. % Unaddressed = Codes Unaddressed / Codes Presented on CDS Assistant x 100 (Rounded to 0 decimal places). E.g. 30%.
