Example: CC, POA, Generic etc.

p.note: Multiple clarification types is displayed comma separated.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of reviewed encounters for which the post-discharge review resulted in a higher reimbursement
Count: Out of total 'Encounters with Impact Opportunity', the count of encounters with Final Billed DRG WT greater than the Final Coded DRG WT.

Percentage: (Encounters Impacted / Encounters with Impact Opportunity) x 100) = ( Count of encounters with Final Billed DRG WT greater than the Final Coded DRG WT / Count of encounters with at-least one post-discharge review opportunity identified) x 100) Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Example: 50 (75%)
Displays the count and percentage of encounters reviewed by the post-discharge case reviewer.
Count: Out of total 'Encounters with Impact Opportunity', the count of encounters with at-least one resolved opportunity or 'No Further Action Required' checked.

Percentage: (Encounters Reviewed/ Encounters with Impact Opportunity) x 100) = (Count of encounters with at-least one resolved opportunity / Count of encounters with at-least one post-discharge review opportunity identified) x 100) Rounded to 0 decimal places
Example: 50 (75%)
Displays the average of Possible DRG weights of all encounters that have an initial review date and Status of: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

Concurrent CMI After CDI = (Sum of Possible DRG WTs [or Working DRG WTs when Possible DRG is blank] of all encounters that have an initial review date and are in the status of Status:In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold. / Count of encounters that have an initial review date and of Status: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.)
Example: 4.1254

p.note: Encounters with status In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold for which Working DRG is blank are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the average of Working DRG weights of all encounters that have an initial review date and Status of In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

Concurrent CMI Before CDI = (Sum of Working DRG WTs of all encounters that have an initial review date and are in the status of Status:In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold. / Count of encounters that have an initial review date and are in the status of In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.)
Example: 2.157

p.note: Encounters with status In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold for which Working DRG is blank are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the shift in weight between Possible DRG and Working DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and Status of: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.
Concurrent CMI Shift= (Concurrent CMI After CDI- Concurrent CMI Before CDI)
Example: 1.9684

p.note: This value is represented with 4 decimals.

entry.p: Displays the percentage shift in weight between Possible DRG and Working DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and Status of: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.
Concurrent CMI Shift(%) = (Concurrent CMI After CDI- Concurrent CMI Before CDI /Concurrent CMI Before CDI) *100
Example: 91%

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Displays the percentage shift at 75% in weight between Possible DRG and Working DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and Status of: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.
Concurrent CMI Shift (%) at 75% = (Concurrent CMI After CDI- Concurrent CMI Before CDI /Concurrent CMI Before CDI) *0.75
Example: 68%

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Negative ‘Potential CMI Shift at 75%’ is displayed in the red font.
This is a binary field to identify and indicate Concurrent Encounters.
When used in report, displays the total count of Concurrent encounters
Displays the total count of reconciled encounters where Final Coded DRG matches with Possible DRG (Working DRG if Possible DRG = Blank)
CDS/Coder Match Value= Y when when the Final Coded DRG matches Possible DRG. (Working DRG if Possible DRG= Blank)
Example: 2

row.entry: Count of Reconciled Cases NCC After CDI

Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC
Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the NCC DRGs for the encounters
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Count of Reconciled Cases NCC and NULL After CDI

Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC and NULL
Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the DRG Specialty for the encounters.
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Count of Reconciled Cases with CC After CDI

entry.p: Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC.
Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the DRG Specialty for the encounters.
entry.note:
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, CDE Analytics considers the Working DRG value.
Example: DRG 200 PNEUMOTHORAX WITH CC; DRG 217 CARDIAC VALVE AND OTHER MAJOR CARDIOTHORACIC PROCEDURES WITH CARDIAC CATHETERIZATION WITH CC

row.entry: Count of Reconciled Cases with MCC After CDI

entry.p: Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as MCC.
Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the DRG Specialty for the encounters.
entry.note:
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Example: 280 ACUTE MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION, DISCHARGED ALIVE WITH MCC; 286 CIRCULATORY DISORDERS EXCEPT AMI, WITH CARDIAC CATHETERIZATION WITH MCC

row.entry: Count of Reconciled Encounters with MS DRG Shift

entry.p: Displays the count of reconciled encounters with MS DRG Shift for the selected View By option.
The count of reconciled encounters that have a MS DRG Shift and have status as Reconciled Impact (Impact Type = Financial, Both, or Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT).

row.entry: Count of Reconciled Medical Cases NCC

Count of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as NCC
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M)
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.
Example: 836 ACUTE LEUKEMIA WITHOUT MAJOR O.R. PROCEDURES WITHOUT CC/MCC; 842 LYMPHOMA AND NON-ACUTE LEUKEMIA WITHOUT CC/MCC
Count of Reconciled Medical Cases NCC and NULL

Count of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as NCC and NULL.
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M)
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.
Example: 839 CHEMOTHERAPY WITH ACUTE LEUKEMIA AS SECONDARY DIAGNOSIS WITHOUT CC/MCC; 311 ANGINA PECTORIS
Count of Reconciled Medical Cases with CC

Count of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as CC
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M)
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation
Example: 121 ACUTE MAJOR EYE INFECTIONS WITH CC/MCC; 147 EAR, NOSE, MOUTH AND THROAT MALIGNANCY WITH CC
Count of Reconciled Medical Cases with MCC

Count of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as MCC.
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M)
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.
Example: 283 ACUTE MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION, EXPIRED WITH MCC; 288 ACUTE AND SUBACUTE ENDOCARDITIS WITH MCC
Count of Reconciled Surgical Cases NCC

The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as NCC
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S)
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical
OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
Example: 320 OTHER ENDOVASCULAR CARDIAC VALVE PROCEDURES WITHOUT MCC; 340 APPENDECTOMY WITH COMPLICATED PRINCIPAL DIAGNOSIS WITHOUT CC/MCC
Count of Reconciled Surgical Cases NCC and NULL

The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as NCC and NULL
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S)
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical
OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
Example: 334 RECTAL RESECTION WITHOUT CC/MCC; 265 AICD LEAD PROCEDURES
Count of Reconciled Surgical Cases with CC

The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as CC
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S)
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical
OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
Example: 217 CARDIAC VALVE AND OTHER MAJOR CARDIOTHORACIC PROCEDURES WITH CARDIAC CATHETERIZATION WITH CC; 240 AMPUTATION FOR CIRCULATORY SYSTEM DISORDERS EXCEPT UPPER LIMB AND TOE WITH CC
Count of Reconciled Surgical Cases with MCC

The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as MCC
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S)
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical
OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
Example: 335 PERITONEAL ADHESIOLYSIS WITH MCC; 344 MINOR SMALL AND LARGE BOWEL PROCEDURES WITH MCC

row.entry:

entry.p: Displays the Discharge Status description as configured in the Discharge Status configuration screen.
Example: Discharged/transferred to skilled nursing facility (SNF)
Displays the Discharge Status ID as configured in the Discharge Status configuration screen.
Example: 01, 03, etc.
Displays the Discharge Month as per the Discharge Date .
Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_MONTH is 2020-09(Sep)
Displays the Discharge Quarter as per the Discharge Date .
Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_QUARTER is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Displays the Discharge Week as per the Discharge Date .
Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_WEEK is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Displays the year and month as per the Discharge Date.
Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_YEARMONTH is 202009
This is flag indicating if the encounter has been discharged.
Example: Displays 1 for discharged encounters.
Displays total count of assigned encounters with blank Initial Review Date and encounter status as 'Review Not Needed'.
Example: 45

p.note: Binary value (0/1) is displayed at encounter level.

entry.p: Displays the count of encounters with Initial Review Date/Time and status as In Progress, Review Complete, Ready to Reconcile and Reconciliation-Hold.
Displays the total count of Unassigned at Discharged encounters.

row.entry: Displays total count of encounters for which Initial Review is performed.

entry.p: Displays the Reimbursement Impact ($) at the encounter level.
Encounter Reimbursement Impact ($) = Encounter Variance* Blended Rate
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Negative ‘Reimbursement Impact ($)’ is displayed in the red font.

row.entry:
Displays the $ value calculating the difference between Final Coded and Reimbursement Assessment. Encounter Reimbursement Impact_Derived = (Final Coded Reimbursement - Reconciliation Assessment Reimbursement)
Example: $(20,000.00 - 17,000.00) = $3,000.00.

entry.p: Displays the list of encounter status available.
Example: Auto Reconciled, Discharged, In Progress
Displays the total reviews performed on the encounter.
Example: 1, 2 etc.
Displays the shift in the weight at the encounter level.
Encounter Variance = Final Coded DRG WT - Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or Variance = Final Coded DRG WT - Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

For encounters with blank Final DRG WT, Encounter Variance = Possible DRG WT - Working DRG WT ( If Possible DRG/WT is blank, Working DRG WT is considered. In this case Encounter Variance will always be zero).

p.note:
Encounter Variance can be negative, positive, or zero.
Negative ‘Variance’ is displayed in the red font Example: 1.0178.

entry.p: Encounter Variance is not calculated for the encounters that do not have an initial review date.
Review Not Needed Encounters are not considered.
Rounded to 4 decimal places. Example: 1.0178

row.entry: Est. Expected Complication Rate After CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Complication Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.84%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Complication Rate Before CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Complication Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places E.g., 0.84%). Note: The value is in %.

row.entry: Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.84%).

row.entry: Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CDI

entry.p: Displays the average of Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CD = The sum of CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).

row.entry:
Displays the expected discharge date of a patient. Example: 01/10/2023.
Expected discharge date is calculated using the Admit Date and Working GMLOS, i.e. Expected Discharge Date = Admission Date + Working GMLOS (in days).

entry.p: Expected Discharge Date and Time Display

row.entry:
Displays the expected discharge date and time of a patient. Example: 1/10/2022 12:25:00 PM ET.
Expected discharge date is calculated using the Admit Date and Working GMLOS, i.e. Expected Discharge Date = Admission Date and Time Display + Working GMLOS (in days).

entry.p: Displays the initial review date sorted by date and time.
Displays the Initial Review Turn Around Time in days, i.e., number of days between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.
(Initial Review TAT (days) for an encounter = Initial Review Date - Admit Date) days

p.note: If patient is discharged before 24 hours, the Initial Review TAT (Days) =0

entry.p: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Displays the Initial Review Turn Around Time in hours, i.e. number of hours between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.
(Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours

p.note: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Displays the type of review based on when Initial Review is done by the CDS.
Example:
If Initial Review is done after patient discharge, Retrospective Review (Initial Review Date/Time > Discharge Date/Time) is displayed.
If Initial Review is done before patient discharge, Concurrent Review (Initial Review Date/Time < Discharge Date/Time) is displayed.

This is a flag to indicate if the encounter is a Matched Encounter, i.e. Final Coded DRG matches with Possible DRG (Working DRG if Possible DRG is Blank).
Example: Displays Y for Matched Encounters
Displays the average of Final DRG WTs of all medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

Medical CMI After CDI = Sum of Final DRG WTs of all medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact. / Total count of medical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). This value is represented with 4 decimals. Example: 4.5874

p.note: Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

entry.p: Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

Displays the average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

Medical CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0) / Total count of Medical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical). Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation. This value is represented with 4 decimals.

entry.note: Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)
entry.p: Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation. This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Displays the shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for medical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)..
Medical CMI Shift(%) = (Medical CMI After CDI- Medical CMI Before CDI.
Example: 1.1396

p.note: Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

entry.p: Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Displays the percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for medical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
Medical CMI Shift(%) = (Medical CMI After CDI- Medical CMI Before CDI /Medical Before CDI) *100
Example: 33%

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.
This value is represented with 0 decimals.

Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for medical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).
Medical Reimbursement Impact ($) = Medical CMI Shift * Blended Rate
Example: 1547

p.note: Medical Reimbursement Impact ($) can be either positive or negative.

entry.p: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.
This value is represented with 0 decimals.

row.entry: Displays the count of reviewed encounters for each standard or custom rank category. Reviewed encounters that do not have a rank assigned are grouped under the 'Unranked' categoryWhen you choose the 'View By' option as CDS, you are looking specifically at the initial review conducted by CDS. This count includes all ranked encounters that had an initial review date/time. However, encounters that were initially reviewed but later marked as "Review Not Needed" are excluded from this calculation.

entry.p: Displays the count of encounters with the highest rank as 1, 2, or 6 that were not reviewed by the CDS. These encounters do not have an initial review date/time. The encounters may or may not have a Discharge Date/time assigned.
Missed Top Rank Reviews = Count of top ranked encounters (Rank 1, 2 and 6) with no initial review, i.e. Initial Review Date/Time is blank.
Only top ranked (Standard Highest Rank 1, 2 and 6) encounters are considered.
No Response Potential CMI Shift

row.entry: Displays the Potential CMI shift and percentage for the financial impact clarifications that were not responded by the providers for the selected time period.Potential CMI Shift = Potential CMI with No Response Impact Clari - Potential CMI w/o No Response Impact Clari.

entry.p: No Response Potential CMI Shift (%)
Displays the Potential CMI shift and percentage for the financial impact clarifications that were not responded by the providers for the selected time period.
Potential CMI Shift % = (Potential CMI with No Response Impact Clari - Potential CMI w/o No Response Impact Clari) / Potential CMI w/o No Response Impact Clari x 100.
No Response Reimbursement Impact ($)
Displays the ‘No Response Reimbursement Impact’ value for the encounter.
'Reimbursement Impact' for an encounter is calculated using the below formula:

li.p: Encounter No Response Reimbursement Impact = (Encounter No Response Variance x Blended Rate).

entry.p: No Response Reimbursement Impact ($)
Displays the ‘No Response Reimbursement Impact’ value for the encounter.
'Reimbursement Impact' for an encounter is calculated using the below formula:

li.p: Encounter No Response Reimbursement Impact = (Encounter No Response Variance x Blended Rate).

entry.p: Overall No Response Reimbursement Impact ($)

row.entry:
Displays the overall potential dollar amount associated with the financial impact clarifications that the providers did not respond for the selected time period. Overall No Response Impact = $(No response Potential CMI Shift * Blended Rate).
Format: $4512.

entry.p: Displays out of total discharged encounters, the percentage of encounters with no initial review or initial review after discharge.
Missed Review % = (Discharged encounters with no initial review or initial review after discharge / Discharged encounters) X 100
Example: 7%
This is a flag to identify and indicate no initial review is done.
Example: Displays 1 for no initial review done.

Displays the list of encounters that are presented to Mortality Worklist..
Y = Encounters that are presented to Mortality Worklist.
N = Encounters that are not presented to Mortality Worklist.
Example: N, Y
Displays the list of Medical Record Number (MRN) of the patients.
Example: 12345
This is a flag to indicate and identify ‘No Further Action Required’ checkbox on the Post-Discharge Review Checklist screen.
Example: Displays Y if Post-Discharge Reviewer selects ‘No Further Action Required’ check box on the Post-Discharge Review Checklist screen.
Displays Reimbursement Value of the encounter in dollars.
Reimbursement ($) = (Possible DRG WT-Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT) X Blended_Rate

p.note: Operating Federal Rate is used if Blended Rate is 0.

entry.p: Displays the Variance of the encounter.
Variance = (Possible DRG WT - Reconciliation Assessment WT)

row.entry: Number of Cases with Financial Impact

entry.p: Number of Cases with Financial Impact = The total count of Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters with F-DRG WT > R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT > 0) and F-DRG WT < R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT < 0).Note: Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters without a shift in the WT (F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT = 0 or F-DRG = R-DRG WT) are not considered in the numerator.
Displays the Operating Federal rate for a single encounter.
Example: 1700

row.entry: Overall Clarifications Agreed Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of sent clarifications with Final response as Agreed.
Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 58 (95%)

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as Alternative Diagnosis.
Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 14 (45%)

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: Overall Clarifications No Response Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as No Response.
Overall Clarifications No Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications with No Response/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Example: 4 (2%)

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: Overall Clarifications Not Agreed Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as Not Agreed.
Overall Clarifications Not Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Not Agreed / Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 10 (9%)

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: Overall Clarifications Other Explanation Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as Other Explanation.
Overall Clarifications Other Explanation Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Other Explanation/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 11 (17%)

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: Overall Clarifications Responded Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of sent clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.
Overall Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Responded/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)
Example: 78 (65%)

note.p: Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
"Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

row.entry: Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as Unable to Determine.
Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)
Example: 18 (12%)

p.note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

entry.p: Displays the average of Final DRG WTs of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

CMI After CDI = The sum of Final Coded DRG WTs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, (Unassigned (DD< 11/14/2019)) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 4 decimal places E.g. 2.1868).
Example: 4.1147

p.note: This value is represented with 4 decimals.

entry.p: Displays the average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact

Overall CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). / Total count of Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)

p.note:
This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Example: 2.9745

entry.p: Displays the shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)).
Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI.

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.
Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI /Overall Before CDI) *100
Example: 38%

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Displays the Overall DRG WT Before CDI
Example: 1.4587
DRG WT Before CDI = Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (Working DRG WT is used if Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT is null or Discharge Date is before 11/14/2019)

row.entry: Overall Encounters with Impact Opportunity Post-Discharge

entry.p: Displays the count of encounters with Post Discharge Opportunity.
Example: 34

row.entry: Overall Instances Agreed Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is Agreed.
Overall Instance Agreed Rate = Instances with response as Agreed / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 25 (12%)

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Overall Instances Alternative Diagnosis Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Alternative Diagnosis".

Overall Instances Alternative Diagnosis Rate = Instances with Response as "Alternative Diagnosis" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 5 (4%)

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Overall Instances No Response Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "No Response".
Overall Instances No Response Rate = Instances with Response as "No Response" / The count of clarification instances sent with Response other than Retracted ) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 19 (23%)

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Overall Instances Not Agreed Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Not Agreed".

Overall Instances Not Agreed Rate = Instances with Response as "Not Agreed" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 14 (12%)

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Overall Instances Other Explanation Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Other Explanation".

Overall Instances Other Explanation Rate = Instances with Response as "Other Explanation" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 33 (47%)

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Overall Instances Responded Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response.

Overall Instances Response Rate = The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response /The count of sent clarification instances with Response other than Retracted.) x 100
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Example: 12 (4%)

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Overall Instances Unable to Determine Count and Rate

entry.p: Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Unable to Determine".

Overall Instances Unable to Determine Rate = Instances with Response as "Unable to Determine" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100
(Rounded to 0 decimal places)
Example: 5 (10%)

note.p: Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
Overall CMI Shift= (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI)
Example: 1.885

p.note: This value is represented with 4 decimals.

entry.p: Displays the percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)).
Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI /Overall Before CDI) *100
Example: 51%

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Impact Encounters.
Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) = Overall CMI Shift * Blended Rate
Example: 45127

p.note: Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) can be either positive or negative.

entry.p: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Billed DRG and Final Coded DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) in which Final Billed WT >= Final Coded WT (Final Billed WT - Final Coded WT >= 0).

Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge = (The sum of Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) with positive Overall WT Shift) * Blended Rate
Example: 1299

p.note:
Total Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounters with negative WT shift i.e. (Final Billed WT - Final Coded WT < 0) are not considered in this metric calculation.
The value must be displayed in $.

row.entry: Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge including negative

entry.p: Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Billed DRG and Final Coded DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).
Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge = (The sum of Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)) * Blended Rate
Example: 2047

p.note:
Total 'Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge including negative' rounded to 0 decimal places.
The 'Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge including negative' can be positive or negative.
The value must be displayed in $.

row.entry: Potential CMI with No Response Impact

entry.p: Displays the potential CMI No Response Impact Clarification.

p.note:
This value is represented with 4 decimals. Format
: 1.9985.

entry.p: Potential CMI with No Response Impact Clari = The sum of Reconciliation Assessment Coded DRG WTs of all Reconciled- No Impact (Impact Type: No Impact), and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) encounters with at least one No Response Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and no other Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and the sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (from backend grouping) of all the Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial) encounters with at least one No Response Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and with at least one Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) / Total count of Reconciled- No Impact (Impact Type: No Impact), and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both , Financial) encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) with Final response as No Response.
Potential CMI without No Response Impact

Displays the potential CMI w/o No Response Impact Clarification. This value is represented with 4 decimals. Format
: 1.9985.
Potential CMI with No Response Impact Clari = The sum of Reconciliation Assessment Coded DRG WTs of all Reconciled- No Impact (Impact Type: No Impact), and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) encounters with at least one No Response Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and no other Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and the sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (from backend grouping) of all the Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial) encounters with at least one No Response Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and with at least one Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) / Total count of Reconciled- No Impact (Impact Type: No Impact), and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both , Financial) encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) with Final response as No Response.
This is a flag to identify and indicate the Potential reimbursement impact.
Example: Negative Impact, No Impact, Positive Impact

entry.p: Displays out of total quality clarifications responded, the percentage of quality clarifications agreed by the providers.
Quality Clarifications Agreed Rate = ( Quality Alerts Clarifications Agreed/Quality Alerts Clarifications Responded)*100

entry.p: Displays out of total quality clarifications sent, the % of quality clarifications responded by the providers.
Quality Clarifications Response Rate = ( Quality Alerts Clarifications Responded/Quality Alerts Clarifications Sent)*100
Example: 77%

p.note: Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays out of the total quality alerts generated, the count of resolved alerts for which quality clarifications were sent by the CDS.
Example: 45

note.p: CDS can send the clarifications to resolve the alerts in 2 ways:
A. Selecting the "Create new clarification on Code" option from the Add to drop down option in the "Specific Exclusions" pop up.
B. Selecting the "New Clarification" link directly from the Quality Alerts panel.

entry.p: Only one clarification can be sent for each quality alert.
This will not include the count of alerts that are active.
Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

note.p: Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Quality Alerts with Other Global Exclusion

note.p: POA option can be used to resolve the alert can be used in 2 ways:
Adding the POA directly in the Review grid.
Selecting "Present on Admission" option from the Global Exclusion pop up.
Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: R-DRG (For No Response): Displays the regrouped Reconciliation DRG (from backend grouping) along with the description in red font. R-DRG WT (For No Response): Displays the regrouped Reconciliation DRG WT (from backend grouping) along with the description in red font. This is displayed in Red font, only for cases with Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as No Response and other Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation are present; For other scenarios, display the R-DRG/R-DRG WT details.

entry.p: Displays the WT associated with the regrouped (from backend grouping) Reconciliation Assessment DRG. Example: 1.0393.

entry.p: Displays the total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.
Example: 25

p.note: Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

entry.p: Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.
Displays the total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.
Example: 34

p.note: Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

entry.p: Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
Displays the list of Primary Diagnosis CM Code from the Reconciliation Assessment section.
Example: A021, J691, N10 etc.

row.entry:
Displays the $ value from the Reconciliation Assessment section in the application.
Example: $17,000.00.

entry.p: Displays date and time when first Reconciliation review was performed by the CDS for the patient.
Example: 8/7/2020
Displays date and time when first Reconciliation review was performed by the CDS for the patient.
Example: 4/1/2020

row.entry: “Reimbursement Impact_Weights” value should be displayed in $. The value should be rounded off to 0 decimal places making it consistent with other reimbursement values.
Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.

entry.p: This is a flag to identify and indicate if review is missed and patient is discharged.
Example: Displays 'Done' if review is missed and discharged.
Displays out of total encounters (Admissions/Discharges), the percentage of encounters reviewed.
Review Rate= Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) / Total encounters (Admissions/Discharges) x 100. (Rounded to 0 decimal places.)
Example: 89%

p.note: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

row.entry: Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Displays the count of encounters with an initial review date/time that had at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant.

entry.p: Displays the total count of reviews performed.
Example: 45
Displays the list of Rate of Mortality (ROM) values in Final Coded Summary Section.
Example: 1, 2, 3, 4 etc.

p.note: Advanced ROM Values are used if Primary ROM values are blank.

entry.p: Displays the list of Rate of Mortality (ROM) values in Reconciliation Assessment section.
Example: 1, 2, 3, 4 etc.

p.note: Advanced ROM Values are used if Primary ROM values are blank.

entry.p: Displays the list of available patient's room numer.
Example: 101, 102, etc
Displays out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of Encounters with SEV Impact Clarifications.

SEV Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100
Example: 41%

note.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: Displays the list of Severity of Illness (SOI) values in Final Coded Summary Section.
Example: 1, 2, 3, 4 etc.

p.note: Advanced SOI Values are used if Primary SOI values are blank.

entry.p: Displays the list of Severity of Illness (SOI) values in Reconciliation Assessment section.
Example: 1, 2, 3, 4 etc.

p.note: Advanced SOI Values are used if Primary SOI values are blank.

entry.p: Displays the list of Speciality ID's as configured in the Specialties configuration screen.
Example: CARD, ORTHO etc.
Displays the list of Specialty descriptions as configured in the Specialties configuration screen.
Example: Cardiologist, Orthopaedic etc.
Displays the count of suggested codes for which CDS generated a clarification.
Displays the suffix for the default timezone configured.
Example: ET is displayed if Eastern Time is the default timezone configured.

Displays the average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

Surgical CMI After CDI = Sum of Final DRG WTs of all surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). / Total count of surgical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact). This value is represented with 4 decimals. Example: 5.4789

p.note: Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

entry.p: Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Displays the average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). .

Surgical CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0) / Total count of Surgical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).
This value is represented with 4 decimals. Example: : 3.3694.

p.note: Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

entry.p: Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Displays the shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for surgical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
Surgical CMI Shift(%) = (Surgical CMI After CDI- Surgical CMI Before CDI.
Example: 2.1095

p.note: Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

entry.p: Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Displays the percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for surgical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).
Surgical CMI Shift(%) = (Surgical CMI After CDI- Surgical CMI Before CDI /Surgical Before CDI) *100
Example: 63%

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
This value is represented with 0 decimals.

The total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for surgical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).
Surgical Reimbursement Impact ($) = Surgical CMI Shift * Blended Rate
Example: $1367

p.note: Surgical Reimbursement Impact ($) can be either positive or negative.

entry.p: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)
Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
This value is represented with 0 decimals.
Display if the encounter has a Target Diagnosis available.

Display Y if available, or Blank.
The Diagnosis codes displayed with a star (*) on the Triage Worklist indicates that the primary code is a target diagnosis code.
This code can either be CLU suggested or manually added.
Displays the total count of encounters that have an Admit Date/time.
Example: 89

p.note: All encounter statuses are considered in this metric (Review Not Needed, Untouched, Discharged, etc.)

entry.p: Displays the total potential reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Working DRG and Possible DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and status of In Progress,Discharged, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.
If Possible DRG Weight is blank, Working DRG Weight is considered: This is applicable only for this metric calculation.
Example: $4933

p.note: Total Concurrent Reimbursement Impact ($) = Concurrent CMI Shift * Blended Rate
Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) can be either positive or negative.

entry.p: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Displays the total potential reimbursement at 75% resulting from shift in the weight between Working DRG and Possible DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and status of In Progress,Discharged, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.
Total Concurrent Reimbursement Impact ($) at 75% = (Total Concurrent Reimbursement Impact($) )*0.75
Example: $3117

p.note: Negative ‘Total Potential Reimbursement($)’ is displayed in the red font.

entry.p: Displays the sum of total missed reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) that have at-least one impact clarifications with Final Response as 'No Response'
Example: $4,777

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Displays the sum of Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) with negative Overall CMI Shift.
Negative Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) for an encounter = (Overall CMI Shift < 0) * Blended Rate
Total Negative Reimbursement Impact ($) = Sum of Negative Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) for all Reconciled Encounters
Example: -$1472

p.note: Total Negative Reimbursement Impact ($) rounded to 0 decimal places.

row.entry: Displays the total reimbursement impact for all the no response financial impact clariifcations.
Total Positive Reimbursement by Init Reviews

This is the total positive reimbursement impact calculated against the count of initial reviews performed. This is a custom field created and is a dollar amount and will be rounded off to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Displays the sum of Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Impact Encounters with positive Overall CMI Shift.
Positive Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) for a reconciled encounter = (Overall CMI Shift >= 0) * Blended Rate
Total Positive Reimbursement Impact ($) = Sum of Positive Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) for all Reconciled Encounters.
Example: $25,877

p.note: Total Positive Reimbursement Impact ($) rounded to 0 decimal places.

entry.p: Displays the sum of Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).
Example: $7,896

p.note: Rounded to 0 decimal places.

row.entry: Count of encounters that were not ranked out of the total discharges for the selected "View By" option. Encounters are ranked based only on the rules that are defined for the prioritization within CDE Triage. Any encounter that does not meet the criteria is defined as an unranked encounter.

The count of unranked encounters reviewed with or without clarifications.
% Unranked Encounters Reviewed = Unranked Encounters Reviewed / Encounters Ranked x 100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places. For example, 30%.

Displays the shift in the WT at the encounter level.
Example: 1.0178.

Encounter Variance = Final Coded DRG WT - Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or Variance = Final Coded DRG WT - Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).
Encounter Variance can be negative, positive, or zero.
Negative variance is displayed in the red font.
Encounter Variance is not calculated for the encounters that do not have an initial review date.
Review Not Needed encounters are not considered for this metric caalculation.
Rounded to 4 decimal places. E.g. 2.1868.
The ‘Reimbursement Impact’ value for the encounter.
Example: $ 5,234.

ul.li: Encounter Reimbursement Impact = Encounter Variance x Blended Rate.
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Negative ‘Reimbursement Impact ($)’ is displayed in the red font.

row.entry: % of Reconciled cases with Positive ROM Impact

entry.p: Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with upward movement of ROM Value.

% of Reconciled cases with Positive ROM Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Example: 40%

p.note: Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

entry.p: Upward change in the ROM value for the reconciled encounter is considered a positive ROM Impact.
Encounters with Blank (or NULL) ROM After and ROM Before is not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: % of Reconciled cases with ROM Impact

entry.p: Any change in the ROM value (Upward/Downward) for the reconciled encounter is considered a ROM Impact.
Encounters with Blank (or NULL) SOI After and SOI Before is not considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: % Shift of Reconciled cases with ROM 2

entry.p: Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with ROM Impact for ROM=2.
(Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 After- Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 Before/Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 Before)*100
Example: 36%

row.entry: % Shift of Reconciled cases with ROM 3

entry.p: Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with ROM Impact for ROM=3.

row.entry: % Shift of Reconciled cases with ROM 4

entry.p: Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with ROM Impact for ROM=4.

Pleurisy,
Extraction of Products of Conception, High, Open Approach

PSI Clarification Agreed Rate = ( Quality Alerts Clarifications Agreed/Quality Alerts Clarifications Responded)*100
Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_MONTH is 2020-09(Sep)

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_QUARTER is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)

row.entry: Do not use. Use 'Additional Reviews' field .

entry.p: Displays the average daily 'Additional reviews' performed for the selected period.
Avg. Daily Additional Reviews= Total Additional Reviews/ No. of days.

p.note: No. of days include weekends.

entry.p: Displays the average daily 'Additional reviews' performed during Weekdays for the selected period.
Avg. Daily Additional Reviews Weekdays= Total Additional Reviews during Weekdays (Additional Reviews Weekdays)/ No. of days.

p.note: No. of days = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM), i.e. Weekend Only Stay = N

entry.p: Displays the average count of Initial Reviews performed (Encounters Reviewed) for the selected period.
Avg. Daily Initial Reviews= Total Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews )/No. of Days.

p.note: No. of days include weekends.

entry.p: Displays the average count of Initial Reviews performed during Weekdays (Encounters Reviewed) for the selected period.
Avg. Daily Initial Reviews Weekdays= Total Encounters Reviewed during weekdays (Initial Reviews Weekdays)/No. of Days

p.note: No. of days = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM), i.e., Weekend Only Stay = N

entry.p: Displays the average daily 'Total Reviews' (Total Reviews= Initial+Additional Reviews) performed during Weekdays for the selected period.
Avg. Daily Total Reviews Weekdays= 'Total Reviews during Weekdays ' (Total Reviews Weekdays)/ No. of days

p.note: No. of days = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM), i.e., Weekend Only Stay = N

entry.p: Displays the number of hours between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.
(Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours
Avg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)

p.note: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Displays the number of days between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.
(Initial Review TAT (days) for an encounter = Initial Review Date - Admit Date) days
Avg. Initial Review TAT(Days) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Days) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)

p.note: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: If patient is discharged before 24 hours, the Initial Review TAT (Days) =0
Avg. Ranked Initial Review TAT (Hours)

row.entry:
Displays the average Ranked Initial Review TAT in hours for the selected View By option, i,e. the number of hours between the Admit Date/Time and when the working review was first created.
Avg. Ranked Initial Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review Initial TAT (Hours) of all the ranked reviewed encounters / Ranked Encounters Reviewed).

entry.p: Avg. Unranked Initial Review TAT (Hours)

row.entry:
Displays the average Unranked Initial Review TAT in hours for the selected View By option, i,e the number of hours between the Admit Date/Time and when the Working Review was first created.
Avg. Unranked Initial Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review Initial TAT (Hours) of all the unranked reviewed encounters / Unranked Encounters Reviewed).

entry.p: Displays average daily encounters reconciled in the selected activity date range.

Encounters Reconciled Per Day = (Total count of Reconciled encounters (Reconciled - Impact, Reconciled No Impact, Auto Reconciled) (assigned to the CDS) for which at least one activity was done by the CDS in the selected activity date range / No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range)
Displays average daily Encounters with Clarifications in the selected activity date range.

Encounters with Clarification Per Day = (Total number of encounters with at least one clarification with status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range / No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range)
